mapper.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE OPNN AS ( SELECT A.ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.STD_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS , CHAR_LENGTH(A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS) AS cmntLen , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , (SELECT PHT_FILE FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS PHT_FILE_BYTE , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS regNm , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , CONCAT('', CONVERT(a.ATCL_CMNT_ID, CHAR(1000)), '') AS PATH , 1 AS cmntLvl FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_CMNT AS A WHERE 1 = 1 AND ( A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID IS NULL OR A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID = '' )
UNION ALL
SELECT A.ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.STD_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS , CHAR_LENGTH(A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS) AS cmntLen , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , (SELECT PHT_FILE FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS PHT_FILE_BYTE , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS regNm , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , CONCAT(B.path, '-', A.ATCL_CMNT_ID) AS PATH , 1+cmntLvl AS cmntLvl FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_CMNT AS A INNER JOIN OPNN AS B ON A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID = B.ATCL_CMNT_ID ) SELECT R.* , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT A.RGTR_ID FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_CMNT AS A WHERE ATCL_CMNT_ID = R.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID)) AS parRegNm FROM OPNN AS R WHERE 1 = 1
